segments.speaker: 题目19/20
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom. I want to remind you all that we will have a paper due every friday, the paper to be a response to the week's reading, and should be at least two pages long. Papers should be uploaded to the class portal on fridays by five P. M. I will grade them and send you feedback by the end of the weekend. Late papers will be marked down by one letter grade each day, unless you speak with me ahead of time and receive an extension.
